chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-92 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case For hearing of main case 25-10-2024 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received so far. However, petitioner has filed this petition against harassment, whereas perusal of record reflects that earlier petitioner had approached Justice of Peace, where such protection was provided to him vide order dated 17.02.2024. Under such circumstances, this petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed. JUDGE Ahmad
